mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp (username, password, name, gender, phone, dept_id, entry_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{deptId}, #{entryDate}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO emp_expr (emp_id, company, profession, begin, end) VALUES
(#{empId}, #{expr.company}, #{expr.profession}, #{expr.begin}, #{expr.end})
